title: Litematica Wand
description: Simple no-bs mod that adds a dummy item for Litematica!
body:
# Litematica Wand
Simple mod that adds a dummy item for Litematica.

Access the item in the "Operator Utilities" creative tab. Enable this tab in `Options ➜ Controls ➜ Operator Items Tab`

You can also do ```/lwand``` to receive a ghost wand that will disappear upon interacting with. This is useful if you're playing in survival or on a server.
